title: lithocarpus paihengii
intro: Lithocarpus paihengii, also known as Chinese cork tree, is a deciduous tree native to China. Traditionally, the bark and leaves of Lithocarpus paihengii have been used in herbal medicine due to their reported medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits associated with Lithocarpus paihengii include reducing fever, alleviating respiratory issues, and supporting cardiovascular health. In herbal preparations, the bark and leaves are often processed into teas, infusions, or decoctions, and may also be combined with other herbs for enhanced effects.
